_comment: IoT Connector response codes. Used by generate_openapi.py to inject per-command error tables.

codes.cause: Command executed successfully
codes.recommended_action: No action required

codes.cause: The device accepted the payload and is processing it asynchronously
codes.recommended_action: Wait for a follow-up event or poll status to confirm completion

codes.cause: The JSON payload is malformed or contains invalid field values
codes.recommended_action: Validate the payload against the command schema and correct any errors

codes.cause: The device could not gather the requested information at this time
codes.recommended_action: Retry the command after a short delay; if persistent, reboot the device

codes.cause: A firmware update is already running on the device
codes.recommended_action: Wait for the current update to complete before sending another set_os command

codes.description: Can't reboot device, inventory in progress
codes.cause: An RFID inventory operation is currently active
codes.recommended_action: Stop the inventory with control_operation before rebooting

codes.cause: No regulatory region has been set on the device
codes.recommended_action: Configure the region before attempting to connect

codes.cause: The requested network interface is not present or not enabled
codes.recommended_action: Verify the device has the required network interface and that it is enabled

codes.cause: Not enough free flash storage to download the firmware file
codes.recommended_action: Free up flash space or use a smaller firmware package

codes.cause: The specified file or certificate could not be found on the device or server
codes.recommended_action: Verify the file path or URL is correct and the file exists

codes.cause: An endpoint or configuration with the same name already exists
codes.recommended_action: Delete the existing configuration first or use a different name

codes.cause: An RFID inventory operation is currently running
codes.recommended_action: Stop the current inventory before starting a new operation or changing the mode

codes.cause: A stop command was sent but no radio operation is currently active
codes.recommended_action: No action required — the radio is already idle

codes.cause: The firmware download or installation failed
codes.recommended_action: Check the firmware URL, network connectivity, and retry the update

codes.description: Battery is low, Cannot update firmware
codes.cause: Battery charge is too low to safely perform a firmware update
codes.recommended_action: Charge the device or connect to external power before retrying

codes.cause: The specified Wi-Fi SSID does not exist in saved profiles
codes.recommended_action: Verify the SSID name is correct and that the profile has been saved

codes.description: WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID
codes.cause: The Wi-Fi profile being deleted is the currently connected network
codes.recommended_action: Disconnect from the network or connect to a different SSID before deleting

codes.cause: The required SSID field is missing from the payload
codes.recommended_action: Include the SSID field in the command payload

codes.cause: A Wi-Fi profile with this SSID is already saved on the device
codes.recommended_action: Delete the existing profile first or update it instead of creating a new one

codes.cause: The maximum number of saved Wi-Fi profiles has been reached
codes.recommended_action: Delete an unused Wi-Fi profile before adding a new one

codes.cause: The device hardware does not have a Wi-Fi interface
codes.recommended_action: Use Ethernet or another supported interface for network connectivity

codes.cause: The specified certificate is not installed on the device
codes.recommended_action: Verify the certificate name and install it using install_certificate if needed

codes.cause: The operating mode requires an advanced profile that has not been configured
codes.recommended_action: Configure the advanced profile settings before setting the operating mode

codes.cause: A field value does not match any of the allowed enum options
codes.recommended_action: Check the schema for allowed values and correct the field

codes.cause: More than 32 prefilter rules were specified
codes.recommended_action: Reduce the number of prefilter rules to 32 or fewer

codes.cause: More than 3 publish topics were specified in the endpoint configuration
codes.recommended_action: Reduce the number of publish topics to 3 or fewer

codes.cause: More than 1 subscribe topic was specified in the endpoint configuration
codes.recommended_action: Use only 1 subscribe topic per endpoint

codes.cause: The tenant ID exceeds the maximum allowed character length
codes.recommended_action: Shorten the tenant ID to within the allowed limit

codes.cause: The tag match pattern string exceeds the maximum allowed length
codes.recommended_action: Shorten the tag match pattern to within the allowed limit
